commands.author: fuller-stack-dev

target.title: feat: add tool search directory mode
target.body:
## Summary
- Add `tools.toolSearch.mode: "directory"` so large catalogs can expose a compact prompt directory plus `tool_describe`/`tool_call` controls while deferring most schemas.
- Hydrate likely or requested directory tools from the catalog, including missing tool calls, while preserving sequential execution contracts.
- Keep client tools directly visible in directory mode and document the new mode.

Fork attribution: based on JuanHuaXu/openclaw `codex/tool-search-directory-mode`, compared from `codex/fix-post-tool-continuation-guard`.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high` returned clean: no accepted/actionable findings.
- Hosted Crabbox/Testbox live E2E: `tbx_01ktppx0dxxps5rf2qtzhg4jwy`, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27223948791

- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high` returned clean: no accepted/actionable findings.

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior or issue addressed: `tools.toolSearch.mode: "directory"` keeps hidden catalog tool schemas deferred while still letting the agent loop hydrate and execute a requested catalog tool through the directory-mode tool path. Latest fix at `1d8fca0082` keeps deferred directory tool-call results in replay context by using the replay-safe allowlist for outbound sanitizer cleanup.
- Real environment tested: Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox using hosted Testbox live credentials from `~/.openclaw-testbox-live.profile`; no local keys were used. Crabbox `0.27.0`, provider `blacksmith-testbox`, Testbox `tbx_01ktppx0dxxps5rf2qtzhg4jwy`, feature-proof head `35198cf3`, merge-refresh head `796472c699`, latest local/autoreview head `1d8fca0082`, model `openai/gpt-5.5`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: Hosted live proof ran `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --label pr-91632-live-plugin-tool-directory-ci --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json --shell -- <hosted live plugin-tool directory-mode runner>`. After the latest fix at `1d8fca0082`, local closeout ran `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`, `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`, `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`, and the required persisted Codex autoreview command.
- Evidence after fix:

```text
provider=blacksmith-testbox id=tbx_01ktppx0dxxps5rf2qtzhg4jwy sync=delegated auth=blacksmith
GitHub Actions run: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27223948791
Hosted live plugin-tool directory-mode proof
Remote ref: 35198cf3
Merge-refresh ref: 796472c699
Latest local fix ref: 1d8fca0082
Crabbox/Testbox profile presence: yes
Hosted credential source: openai
Live model ref: openai/gpt-5.5
Injected E2E fixture config: tools.toolSearch.mode=directory
Running live plugin tool Docker E2E...
Profile file: /home/runner/.openclaw-testbox-live.profile
Live plugin tool Docker E2E passed
blacksmith run summary sync=delegated command=2m30.967s total=2m41.376s exit=0

Latest local proof at 1d8fca0082:
oxlint passed for attempt.ts, attempt.test.ts, and agent-loop.test.ts
Vitest passed 4 shards, 7 files, 310 tests in 21.96s
git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD passed
autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported
overall: patch is correct (0.82)
```

- Observed result after fix: The hosted E2E built and packed OpenClaw, installed a packed fixture plugin with a real npm dependency, enabled the plugin, ran a live `openai/gpt-5.5` agent turn in directory tool-search mode, and verified the model called the plugin tool successfully. After `1d8fca0082`, focused local proof also verifies deferred directory tool calls allowed only by the replay-safe allowlist are preserved with their paired tool result instead of being stripped before provider continuation.
- What was not tested: Direct Azure Crabbox was not run because this laptop is not logged into Azure Crabbox. Exact-head hosted live E2E was not rerun after the merge-only refresh from `9d2c4b5` to `796472c699` or after the focused replay-sanitizer fix at `1d8fca0082`; the hosted live behavior proof remains from feature head `35198cf3`, and latest-head coverage is focused local lint/Vitest/diff/autoreview. An earlier hosted Testbox attempt `tbx_01ktppshrctts4n4agcg7d3jpb` failed before E2E on pnpm's non-TTY dependency reconciliation prompt; the rerun set `CI=1` and passed.
